rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARVA JEANNIE RIDGE-WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/30/2025. The following issues are to be cleared two weeks before the date. (1) Notice of Hearing to be given to Michael Kasolas, probate referee, who filed a Request for Special Notice on November 4, 2024, pursuant to Prob. Code sec. 1250. (2) Allegations regarding whether the probate referee has been paid. (3) Need an authority under which the court can approve the executor's action to distribute $16,000 to the heir without seeking court permission. (4) Petition to ascertain whether the funds being deposited have sufficient FDIC coverage of $250,000, as the current balance exceeds this amount. (5) This petition is brought on waiver of account. The caption and the notice must state so accordingly. CRC 7.150 and 7.50. (6) Waiver of accounting and receipt of $16,000 from the heir not on file despite the allegation in paragraph 17. Exhibit B has no material. (7) Proposed order must be submitted before the hearing. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LYNCH FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Forconfirmation Of Validity Of Estate Plan Documents; Account And Return Of Trust Assets; Double Damages; And Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural Issues on Petition: (1) Notice of Hearing not on file. (2) Petition to set forth under which capacity the petitioner is asking for the respondents'account. Paragraph 48 alleges that he is a 6% rental income beneficiary. If so, the petition needs to set forth the information whether the trustee has faied to submit a requested account within 60-days after written request. Prob. Code 17200(b(7).(C). (3) Proposed order not submitted. Procedural Issues on Objection: (1) Proof of service not on file. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDISON KWOCK FAI TSENG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/22/2025. The following issues to be cleared two weeks before. (1) Need Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be conventionally filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E and 14.59.C. (2) Proposed Order must be submitted. LRSF 14.7.A. (3) Further allegations are needed regarding the lack of known next of kin, including a declaration of due diligence to search for heirs at law. (4) Notice of Directions for Remote appearance and Access must be given. LRSF 14.1.C. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
